markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Kyle Schwarber records 1+ stolen bases in Pittsburgh vs Philadelphia professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 29, 2026 at 6:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Kyle Schwarber is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Kyle Schwarber starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Kyle Schwarber is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Kyle Schwarber is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on stolen bases recorded.
markets.title: Kyle Schwarber: 1+ stolen bases?
